channel.title: Du-Jiao-Sieve on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Du-Jiao-Sieve on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #2: Multiplicative Functions, Möbius Inversion & Dirichlet Convolution
item.description: Multiplicative functions, single-point and linear-sieve evaluation; Möbius function, both forms of Möbius inversion with full derivations and examples; Dirichlet convolution, key identities, Du Jiao sieve; generalized Möbius inversion on posets.

item.title: Number Theory #4: Min_25 Sieve and Du Jiao Sieve
item.description: Min_25 sieve: theory, two complete examples, Lagrange interpolation for power sums. Du Jiao sieve: template, P3768, GCD sum, LCM sum.
